'''''Star Wars: The Last Command''''' collects all six issues from [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|''Star Wars: The Last Command'' comic adaptation]] series of comics based on the novel ''[[The Last Command]]''. It was released [[June 2]], [[1999]].

==Publisher's summary==
'' ''The Last Command'' concludes the adaptation of Timothy Zahn's best-selling Thrawn Trilogy, drawing to a shattering climax the events set into motion in ''Star Wars: Heir to the Empire'' and ''Star Wars: Dark Force Rising''. Thrawn is creating an army of genetically engineered shock troops in an effort to overwhelm the forces of the Rebellion. Meanwhile, dark Jedi Master C'baoth plans to kidnap the newborn twins of Princess Leia and raise them as the first of a new legion of dark Jedi!''
